applicationProtocol.legacyRule: AuthReq.client_protocol_version omitted or zero is treated as legacyImplicitProtocolVersion.

tooOld.defaultUpgradeMessage: A newer game client is required. Please update and try again.

tooNew.defaultUpgradeMessage: This game service is not ready for this client version. Please retry shortly.

upgradeUrlBoundary: A release owner may set a non-empty AuthRes.upgrade_url only to a publicly available absolute HTTPS URL. Empty means no authoritative update link is configured.
